com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class InputAccount.InputAccountResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountResponse
  • Enclosing class:
    InputAccount

    public static class InputAccount.InputAccountResponse
extends BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
    The response data of input account command.

      The CVV code, if the switch in terminal turns on, this field can exist or NULL, else it must be NULL.

      For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY: Indicate that if signature is needed

      Track1 data or tag 56, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.

      Track2 data or tag 57 (Track 2 Equivalent Data), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.

      Track3 data, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.

      • InputAccountResponse

        public InputAccountResponse()

    • Method Detail

      • getEntryMode

        public java.lang.String getEntryMode()
        The Entry Mode.
        Returns:
        0:Manual 1:Swipe 2: Contactless 3: Scanner 4: Chip 5: Chip Fall Back Swipe 6: Front camera 7: Rear camera

      • getTrack1Data

        public java.lang.String getTrack1Data()
        Track1 data or tag 56, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
        Returns:
        Track1 data (May be encrypted.)

      • getTrack2Data

        public java.lang.String getTrack2Data()
        Track2 data or tag 57 (Track 2 Equivalent Data), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
        Returns:
        Track2 data (May be encrypted.)

      • getTrack3Data

        public java.lang.String getTrack3Data()
        Track3 data, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
        Returns:
        Track3 data (May be encrypted.)

      • getPan

        public java.lang.String getPan()
        Account Number or tag 5A (PAN), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
        Returns:
        Account Number for manual entry (May be encrypted.)

      • getExpiry

        public java.lang.String getExpiry()
        Returns:
        The expiration date for manual entry in format of MMYY.

      • getKsn

        public java.lang.String getKsn()
        Returns:
        The KSN.

      • getCardholder

        public java.lang.String getCardholder()
        Returns:
        Card holder name.

      • getServiceCode

        public java.lang.String getServiceCode()
        The service code of the card
        Returns:
        The service code

      • getContactlessTransactionPath

        public java.lang.String getContactlessTransactionPath()
        Contactless transaction path.

        00 - EMV contact
        10 - contactless PAYPASS (MSD)
        11 - contactless PAYPASS (MCHIP)
        20 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD)
        21 - contactless PAYWAVE (QVSDC)
        22 - contactless PAYWAVE (CONTACT)
        23 - contactless PAYWAVE (WAVE2)
        24 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD_CVN17)
        25 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD_LEGACY)
        26 - contactless PAYWAVE (VSDC)
        30 - contactless DPAS (MSD)
        31 – contactless DPAS (EMV)
        32 – contactless DPAS (ZIP)
        40 - contactless EXPRESSPAY (MSD)
        41 - contactless EXPRESSPAY (EMV)
        50 - contactless JCB (MSD)
        51 - contactless JCB (EMV)
        52 - contactless JCB (LEGACY)
        53 - contactless JCB (WAVE2)
        60 - contactless qPBOC (QVSDC)
        61 - contactless qPBOC (VSDC)
        70 - contactless Flash (EMV)

        The first character represents the card type
        Returns:
        Contactless Transaction Path

      • getAuthorizationResult

        public java.lang.String getAuthorizationResult()
        For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY: Indicate the transaction result:
        0: transaction offline approved
        1: transaction offline declined
        2: transaction online authorization needed
        Returns:
        Transaction result

      • getSignatureFlag

        public java.lang.String getSignatureFlag()
        For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY: Indicate that if signature is needed

        0: Signature is NOT needed 1: Signature is needed

        Returns:
        Signature Flag

      • getOnlinePINFlag

        public java.lang.String getOnlinePINFlag()
        For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY: Indicate that if online PIN is needed

        0: Online PIN is NOT needed 1: Online PIN is needed

        Returns:
        OnlinePIN Flag

      • getMaskedPAN

        public java.lang.String getMaskedPAN()
        The Masked PAN of the card.
        Returns:
        Examples:
        XXXXXX******XXXX
        XXXXXXXX****XXXX

      • getBarcodeType

        public java.lang.String getBarcodeType()
        Barcode Type
        Returns:
        '0'- QRCode '1' – 2D-barcode '2' – 3Dbarcode

      • getBarcodeData

        public java.lang.String getBarcodeData()
        Barcode data
        Returns:
        Barcode data

      • getEncryptionTransmissionBlock

        public java.lang.String getEncryptionTransmissionBlock()
        Encryption Transmission Block. Only valid when Encryption Flag as 4 (Voltage E2EE).
        Returns:
        Encryption Transmission Block.

      • getEmvData

        public java.lang.String getEmvData()
        If contact EMV card is read successfully, some related EMV data will be returned in consecutive TLV format data. Note: All the EMV TLV data shall be expanded to double length.

        Tag   Required Description
        4F   Application Identifier
        50   Application Label
        56   If tag 56 exists and is not encrypted, it shall e returned Track 1 Data
        57   If tag 57 is not encrypted, it shall be returned Track 2 Equivalent Data
        5A   If tag 5A is not encrypted, it shall be returned Application Primary Account Number
        5F20   Cardholder Name
        5F24   Application Expiry Date
        5F25   Application Effective Date
        5F2D   Language Preference
        5F30   Service Code
        5F34   Application Primary account Number sequence number
        9F11   Issuer Code Table Index
        9F12   Application preferred Name
        9F39   POS Entry Mode, indicates the method by which the PAN was entered, according to the first two digits of the ISO 8583 POS Entry Mode.
        As referring to ISO 8583 specification, the first 2 bytes of entry mode for ICC card is always “05”

        See EMV Tags for Response of Input Account for definition.


        For MSR TRANSACTIONs:
        Full Integration tag DFA006 for Preferred Language Data will be returned for MSR transactions.

        See MSR TLV Data for definition.

        Returns:
        TLV data

      • getCVVCode

        public java.lang.String getCVVCode()
        The CVV code, if the switch in terminal turns on, this field can exist or NULL, else it must be NULL. Only CREDIT/GIFT supports it
        Returns:
        The CVV code

      • getZipCode

        public java.lang.String getZipCode()
        Returns:
        The zip code

      • getEncryptedEMVTLVData

        public java.lang.String getEncryptedEMVTLVData()
        Encrypted EMV TLV Data. See getEmvData()
        Returns:
        encryptedEMVTLVData

      • getEncryptedSensitiveTLVData

        public java.lang.String getEncryptedSensitiveTLVData()
        Encrypted SRED data.

        Please see the definition format of Encrypted Sensitive TLV Data

        Returns:
        encryptedSensitiveTLVData

      • getVASCode

        public java.lang.String getVASCode()
        VAS response code.

        Attribute: n..3

        See VAS Code Definition for definition.
        Returns:
        VASCode

      • getVASData

        public java.lang.String[] getVASData()
        Tokens should be returned here.
        If more than one token is returned the tokens should be separated by .
        Note:
        VASDATA contains several tokens. They are separated by .
        If VASDATA contains 3 tokens, the format is: Token1Token2Token3

        Attribute: String[]

      • getNDEFData

        public java.lang.String getNDEFData()
        Google SmartTap response data in format of NDEF, the message will be encoded with Base64.

        Attribute: ans...1024

      • getCvm

        public java.lang.String getCvm()
        Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Codes

        0 - Fail CVM processing
        1 - Plaintext Offline PIN Verification
        2 - Online PIN
        3 - Plaintext Offline PIN and Signature
        4 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification
        5 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification and Signature
        6 - Signature
        7 - No CVM Required
        8 - On Device CVM

        Returns:
        CVM

      • getPinpadType

        public java.lang.String getPinpadType()
        Pinpad Type:

        Returns:
        0: Internal Pinpad
        1: External Pinpad
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • getLuhnValidationResult

        public java.lang.String getLuhnValidationResult()

      • getCustomEncryptedData

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getCustomEncryptedData()
        An array of encrypted strings representing custom encrypted data.

        Attribute: var

        Since:
        V1.09.01

      • getCustomMACInfo

        public InputAccount.InputAccountResponse.CustomMACInfo getCustomMACInfo()
        Data encrypted by MAC Key.
        Please see ManageResponse.CustomMACInfo for detail.

        Attribute: Var

        Returns:
        Custom MAC Information.

      • unpack

        public void unpack(ManageResponse srcResponse)
        Specified by:
        unpack in class BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
